rationale: For Portugal, the Iran deal timing uncertainty is the main indirect concern via energy prices; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant to daily life.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: Continued uncertainty over Iran nuclear deal keeps oil and gas prices unpredictable. Portugal's energy costs and tourism economy remain indirectly exposed.

top_events.title: Canada-EU unity call before G7 summit
top_events.summary: Canadian PM Carney calls for Canada-EU solidarity ahead of G7; signals potential EU trade and diplomatic positioning that could marginally affect Portugal's export economy.

top_events.title: New EU migration rules debated
top_events.summary: EU-wide migration policy reform discussions continue; Portugal as a western periphery country has limited direct exposure but EU-level decisions affect all member states.
